openai_response_text_extraction.summary: Extracts bounded text from OpenAI output_text/text/response_text or Responses API output content text.

provider_to_cognition_artifact.summary: Invokes provider, passes provider_response_artifact into run_cognition_artifact_runtime, and stores success result.

provider_result_embedding.summary: Embeds provider_response_artifact, llm_cognition_artifact, hashes, and cognition_replay_reference in provider_results.

cognition_artifact_persistence.summary: Persists LLM_COGNITION_ARTIFACT_V1 and returned artifact to provider cognition replay directory.

end_to_end_result_assembly.summary: Stores provider response hashes, cognition artifact hashes, human-facing result, and stage replay references.

human_facing_result_assembly.summary: Builds comparison/clarification-oriented human_facing_cognition_result without normalized findings/assumptions/risks/uncertainties.

cli_rendering_dispatch.summary: Conversational OCS dispatch renders render_ocs_llm_cognition_end_to_end_summary plus REAL_LLM_PROVIDER_USED_BY_OCS.

technical_summary_renderer.summary: Renderer outputs technical status fields and does not render normalized cognition content.

findings: Sapianta should validate the first product through governed cognition before execution.
The prompt requests product opportunity analysis, not autonomous mutation.
assumptions: The operator wants replay-visible strategic cognition.
risks: Provider output remains non-authoritative and requires governance framing.
uncertainties: Market entry sequencing requires additional operator input.

minimal_safe_fix: Add a non-authoritative operator cognition renderer sourced from normalized cognition artifacts or replay-equivalent stage capture fields.
Append the operator cognition view to the existing technical summary instead of replacing the summary.
Render findings, assumptions, alternatives, risks, uncertainties, confidence, allowed next step, and clarification candidates.
Preserve provider non-authority, human review requirement, replay references, fail-closed behavior, and no execution/approval/worker flags.

final_outputs.ROOT_CAUSE: conversational OCS renders a technical completion summary and does not render normalized cognition content
final_outputs.MINIMAL_SAFE_FIX: add a non-authoritative operator cognition renderer sourced from normalized cognition artifacts, preserving the existing technical summary and replay references
